text:
Page 8 of character cards from the Hunter × Hunter Arena Battle mobile game.
Page 1: Cards #1 ~ #88
Page 2: Cards #89 ~ #178
Page 3: Cards #179 ~ #287
Page 4: Cards #288 ~ #385
Page 5: Cards #388 ~ #498
Page 6: Cards #499 ~ #621
Page 7: Cards #622 ~ #843
Page 8: Cards #844 ~ #913

| colspan="9" |[Pierce] Activates when exactly two cards are flipped. The damage dealt by this card on this turn will not be affected by the opponent's Counter or Reduction effects and deals an additional 1 special damage (4 when maxed). Activates after you discard one character card with an ATK lower than this one in your hand. For 2 turns, decrease the "Zoldyck Family" GP cost of two cards in your hand. [Support] On placement, activates if you have a [Haste] character card on the board. At the start of the turn, deal 3 special damage. [Secret Maneuver] One placement, activates if you have a [Covert] character card on the board. While this card is on the board, increase the special damage dealt by +3.
